text: Time moves in one direction. You cannot undo what happened yesterday, but you can change what happens tomorrow. Most people know what they should do in any given situation and choose not to do it anyway. That gap between knowing and doing is where most of life's problems live. Thinking clearly is harder than it looks because your mind prefers comfort over accuracy. The things worth having usually require more patience than you initially planned to give them. None of this is secret knowledge. It is just true.
